<!-- A short description of the feature. -->

## Why is this needed?

<!-- What problem does it solve? Which structure or workflow does it affect? -->

<!-- Optional: sketch of how you'd implement it.
     For a new structure, name the Excel sheets and describe the primitive types.

<!-- Optional: how will we know this is done?
